body_txt: Jokes about boogers and/or snot. Used often for the sake of grossout and/or immaturity. 'Snot that hard to write a joke about all things mucus-related, so you shouldn't have to dig that deep to pick out a good example of this joke . Subtrope of Paste Eater . See also Nose Shove , Toilet Humour , Snot Bubble . Can overlap with Frozen Bodily Fluids and Couldn't Find a Tissue .
